sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n43773" key="eu)e(/n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐἕν</orth>, an exclamation <sense id="n43773.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">like</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὔἁν, εὐοἵ</ref></xr>, Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.503</biblScope> </bibl> (nisi leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">εὐαἵ</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
